compartments.label: NEURONS
compartments.snippet: Central compartment in panel E labeled NEURONS, containing ADF, AWB, URX, RIC neuron subtypes

compartments.label: ADF
compartments.snippet: ADF neuron shown as blue pentagon within NEURONS compartment in panel E, associated with tph-1

compartments.label: AWB
compartments.snippet: AWB neuron shown as green triangle within NEURONS compartment in panel E, associated with ser-6

compartments.label: URX
compartments.snippet: URX neuron shown as yellow hexagon within NEURONS compartment in panel E, associated with mod-1

compartments.label: RIC
compartments.snippet: RIC neuron shown as red hexagon within NEURONS compartment in panel E, associated with tbh-1

compartments.label: INTESTINE
compartments.snippet: Right compartment in panel E labeled INTESTINE, containing nhr-76 and ATGL pathway

genes.snippet: Labeled near ADF neuron in panel E; also appears in panels A and B as Patgl-1::GFP reporter in tph-1 mutant background
Labeled on URX neuron (yellow hexagon) in panel E; also referenced in transgene Pflp-8::mod-1SAS in panels C and D
Labeled near AWB neuron (green triangle) in panel E
Labeled near RIC neuron (red hexagon) in panel E, associated with octopamine (Oct) signaling
Labeled in INTESTINE compartment in panel E; shown activating ATGL
Labeled downstream of nhr-76 in INTESTINE compartment in panel E; reporter Patgl-1::GFP used throughout figure

tentative_edges.snippet: Panel E shows tph-1 in ADF producing 5-HT arrow pointing to mod-1 on URX neuron
Panel E shows tbh-1 associated with RIC neuron with Oct label and arrow indicating octopamine signaling

tentative_edges.relation: serotonin receptor expressed in AWB, participates in neuronal signaling circuit
tentative_edges.snippet: ser-6 labeled on AWB triangle in panel E within NEURONS compartment
Panel E shows dashed arrow labeled 'endocrine signal' from URX/NEURONS to INTESTINE
Panel E shows nhr-76 → ATGL arrow in INTESTINE compartment
Panel E shows ATGL → β-oxidation / Fat loss in INTESTINE compartment

tentative_edges.relation: initiates endocrine signal leading to fat loss
tentative_edges.snippet: Panel E shows dots emanating from URX (mod-1) neuron with dashed arrow to INTESTINE; panels C-D show Pflp-8::mod-1SAS blocks 5-HT-induced Patgl-1::GFP increase

tentative_edges.relation: required for serotonin-dependent fat loss via endocrine signal
tentative_edges.snippet: Panel B shows tph-1 mutant has reduced Patgl-1::GFP fluorescence compared to wild-type
